expected_behavior: monotonic predicate flags zero new evidence; system varies Q, switches slot, or escalates clarification; eventually 15-turn ceiling fires (turn_ceiling_15_no_spec)
suspected_failure: Meta keeps asking same slot, dual-retry burns turns silently, no monotonic violation logged
actual_behavior: Identical answer submitted 5 times. T1 accepted as relevant (covered_slots=['job'], confidence=0.1). T2 (identical repeat) was rejected by the triage layer as off-topic/non-relevant — response echoed the previous question text but with covered_slots=[], open_slots=[], confidence=0.0, terminated=false (the 1st-consecutive-non_relevant bounce-back path in src/web/spec.rs around line 1195). T3 (identical) triggered the 2nd-consecutive non_relevant guard (non_relevant_count >= 2), terminating the session with termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' and spec_capsule_cid=null. T4 and T5 returned HTTP 4xx with kind='session_terminated' (idempotent post-terminate behavior). Confidence never grew past 0.1; covered_slots never advanced past ['job']; no slot hallucination from repetition; no 5xx; no question hallucination. The 15-turn ceiling never fired because the EARLIER off-topic guard caught the adversarial pattern at T3 — this is a stronger safety result than the scenario's expected turn_ceiling_15_no_spec path (fewer wasted LLM calls, faster user feedback). Note: triage 'off_topic' classification of an identical repeat of a previously-accepted relevant answer is intuitively correct (no new information) but is a triage-driven outcome, not a P4-monotonic-predicate outcome — the P4 verdict surface is not exposed in /api/spec/turn responses so the predicate trajectory is not directly observable via the public API.

metrics.monotonic_predicate_violations: not_directly_observable_via_api (P4 lives server-side; emptied covered_slots on T2/T3 is the *triage*-rejection signature, not a P4 violation)

anomalies: termination via triage 'non_relevant >= 2' (user_input_unparseable_no_spec) rather than scenario-anticipated P4-monotonic violation or 15-turn ceiling — same containment outcome, faster path
no spec_capsule_cid emitted on terminate (expected for no-spec terminations per src/web/spec.rs F6 fix — pre-F6 shellout was broken and was removed)
P4 monotonic predicate verdict not surfaced in /api/spec/turn response envelope (only covered_slots/confidence are observable; predicate verdicts live in turn capsules, not in the HTTP response)
notes: Backend is up at 127.0.0.1:8080 (HTTP 303 -> /welcome on root).

No session-detail or capsule-walk HTTP endpoint exists — only POST /api/spec/turn (confirmed via probes returning 404 for /api/spec/session/<id>, /api/spec/audit, /api/cas/walk, etc.). The CLI './target/debug/turingos spec audit' is interactive and requires SILICONFLOW_API_KEY in this shell to enter the 8-question loop, so CAS walk via CLI is not feasible in this scenario context; cas_walk.txt captures the CLI invocation and its environmental limitation.

Triage class is not in the /api/spec/turn response envelope; the inferred_triage_class_per_turn field is inferred from envelope shape (empty covered_slots + echoed prev question + terminated=false => 1st-consec non_relevant rejection; terminated=true + user_input_unparseable_no_spec => 2nd-consec non_relevant abort), cross-referenced against the F6 code path at src/web/spec.rs lines ~1100-1180.
